docs.summary: Provides functionality for elements that can be used and understood by as many people as possible, regardless of their abilities.
description: Accessbility ensures that Wix elements are inclusive and usable by everyone including users with visial, auditory, motor, and cognitive disabilities.
The accessibility object's attributes enhance the accessibility of Wix elements, especially for those who use screen readers and other assistive technologies.
[Mixins](https://support.wix.com/en/article/velo-about-mixins) provide functionality that other elements can inherit and use.
Mixins are not elements. You cannot add mixins to a page in the Editor like other `$w` elements, and mixins are not meant to be used directly

docs.summary: An object containing functionality for making elements accessibile to all.
